_note: Role -> download source map. Bootstrap fetches any role listed here that is NOT already in manifest.json, chunks it into <sha>.bin, and updates the manifest. Sources are tried in order. If all sources fail or a role has no URL yet, the role is skipped with a warning; other roles still bootstrap.
_todo: The five large legacy models (coder, qwen14b, physics, chemistry, vision) need GGUF URLs pinned. For now the two planner roles are wired end-to-end. See scratchpad/kicad_integration.md sibling doc when we settle on hosts.

coder-big._note: Fetched out of band via curl; bootstrap disabled (empty sources) so it does not race with the manual pull.

qwen3-8b-huihui-v2._note: Shared by planner / physics / chemistry flows in the Models settings tab.

vision-8b-huihui._note: LLM half of the vision pair; needs vision-8b-huihui-mmproj alongside.

vision-8b-huihui-mmproj._note: Multi-modal projector partner for vision-8b-huihui. F16 (do not quantize).

qwen-image._note: Qwen-Image 20B MMDiT text-to-image create model. Pairs with qwen-image-edit-2511 for the same-actor gen->edit workflow. Uses qwen_image_vae + Qwen2.5-VL text encoder (both shared with the edit model).

qwen2.5-vl-7b-abliterated._note: Abliterated Qwen2.5-VL-7B text encoder. Used as --llm for both Qwen-Image (create) and Qwen-Image-Edit-2511 (edit). Refusal path stripped so NSFW / uncensored prompts pass without the plain build's guardrail responses.

qwen2.5-vl-7b-abliterated-mmproj._note: Multimodal projector partner for qwen2.5-vl-7b-abliterated. Loaded via --llm_vision on Qwen-Image-Edit-2511 (needed to consume the reference image as vision tokens for identity preservation).
